summary: SEO implementation verified end-to-end on the live preview URL. robots.txt and sitemap.xml are served (HTTP 200) at site root; meta tags (title, description, keywords, canonical, robots=index,follow, OG, Twitter, geo) are all present and correct; service section renders all target keywords; heading hierarchy is proper (1 H1, 6 H2, 13 H3); all 7 hero/portfolio images have non-empty alt attributes. Only issue: meta description length is 183 chars, exceeding the <=160 requirement.
passed: /robots.txt served with 200 and contains Sitemap: https://ripplevfxstudios.com/sitemap.xml
/sitemap.xml served with 200 and lists 6 URLs (home + about/services/projects/team/contact anchors)
<title> = 'Ripple VFX Studios | VFX Studio Vancouver | Visual Effects Studio Canada' (contains required keywords)
meta keywords include VFX Studio Vancouver, Nuke Compositing, Digital Matte Painting, Motion Graphics, AI Creative Studio
Open Graph tags present: og:type, og:url, og:title, og:description, og:image, og:site_name, og:locale
Twitter Card tags present: twitter:card=summary_large_image, url, title, description, image
Geo tags present: geo.region=CA-BC, geo.placename=Vancouver, geo.position, ICBM
Rendered services section contains Nuke Compositing, Digital Matte Painting, Motion Graphics, AI Creative Studio
Heading hierarchy: H1=1 ('Creating Visual Excellence'), H2=6, H3=13
All 7 images have alt attributes populated

failed.issue: meta[name=description] is 183 characters, exceeds the <=160 requirement (Google truncates around 155-160 chars in SERPs)
failed.evidence: Content: 'Ripple VFX Studios offers premium visual effects, Nuke compositing, digital matte painting, motion graphics, and AI-powered creative services. Leading VFX studio in Vancouver, Canada.' (len=183) at /app/frontend/public/index.html line 10

action_items: Shorten meta description in /app/frontend/public/index.html (line 10) to <=160 chars. Suggestion: 'Ripple VFX Studios - Premium visual effects, Nuke compositing, digital matte painting, motion graphics & AI creative services in Vancouver, Canada.' (~150 chars)
notes: Backend testing skipped per request. Deployment note (from problem statement): robots.txt and sitemap.xml are served correctly on the preview URL, so they will be accessible at domain root after Hostinger deployment. User can then submit sitemap to Google Search Console.
